reasoning: My son called me again this year from Kerala and said to vote for Shantanu Thakur — he is a minister now, he said, and the citizenship law is still the right thing. I remember the pradhan's family's tears in 2022, how they finally had hope for something that would not disappear like ration cards do when elections change. I am old and I do not understand these things fully, but I voted BJP last time and my son has not told me to change. Even though the TMC still gives me the health card, I want something permanent for my family, not just handouts that come and go.
primary_drivers: My son's continued guidance and trust in the citizenship law's permanence
The emotional memory of the pradhan's family's happiness in 2022
Desire for something permanent beyond TMC's ration schemes
